description_long: This is a compact, rectangular toaster with a predominantly white body and black end panels, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance. The top features two parallel toast slots, each with a metallic interior, designed to accommodate standard slices of bread. The front panel includes a lever and a small button, likely for lowering bread and adjusting settings, both rendered in a matching black and silver color scheme. The sides are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the appliance's clean lines and functional design. The back panel is plain, with no visible controls or openings, while the base is slightly elevated on four short feet. The overall construction suggests a sturdy appliance suitable for use in kitchens, break rooms, or urban communal spaces.
description: A modern, rectangular toaster with a white body, black ends, and two metallic toast slots on top. Features a lever and button on the front for operation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smooth, white panel with black end caps and no visible controls.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the lever and button, as well as the two toast slots on top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, with a plain white panel and black end caps.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain black panel with no controls or openings.
attribute_toast_slots: Two rectangular toast slots on top, evenly spaced, with metallic interiors.
